productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Black Wave Flip Flops
description: This absolutely stylish pair of Wave IND flip flops from puma makes it a fantastic casual wear. The cushioned footbed ensures maximum comfort for the feet while the minimalist design of the cat adds a classy look. The brand badge coupled with a velvety inner along the synthetic straps is a perfect combination of comfort and style. The TPU outsole with circular grooves ensures great grip on damp surfaces, making it great beachwear and pool side slipper.UpperFabric upper offer dry comfort to the feetTextile straps with padded innerToe separator to hold the forefoot in place, and to add comfort and styleMidsoleSoft, cushioned footbed for step-in comfortCat logo and wave like pattern on the footbedOutsoleTPU outsole with round suction points all over for grip and traction CareWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not store in direct sunlight
